content:
Welcome

Janelle set up this notes app for you, Daddy.
You can write notes here anytime.

It saves automatically so you do not have to worry about losing anything.

How to Use This App

Tap the + button to create a new note.
Your notes are saved automatically.

## Tips
- Use # at the start of a line to make a heading
- Use - at the start of a line to make a list
- You can search your notes using the magnifying glass icon

Janelle Setup Notes

Daddy, I set this up on March 10, 2025.
The app is called Obsidian. It stores notes right on your phone.

If you have any trouble just call me and I will walk you through it.
Love, Janelle

Woodworking Ideas

- Toy chest for Isaiah - cedar, about 24 inches wide
- Birdhouse for the back yard - use the oak scraps left from the fence
- Fix the rocking chair on the porch - seat slats are cracked
- Maybe a little step stool for Amara
